All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

O

OBJECTIVE - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.MessageId
OBJECTIVE message type
ObjectiveCard - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.objective
The ObjectiveCard abstract class represent a generic objective card and is used as a blueprint for specific objective cards.
ObjectiveCard(int, int) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.objective.ObjectiveCard
The ObjectiveCard(id, points) constructor uses the constructor of the superclass to assign the id and assigns the number of points given per completion to his respective attribute.
ObjectiveDeck - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.decks
The ObjectiveDeck class is a subclass of Deck that creates a list of ObjectiveCards.
ObjectiveDeck(CardCreator) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.decks.ObjectiveDeck
The ObjectiveDeck(cc) constructor calls the constructor of the superclass to instantiate the ArrayList of cards, then it creates the fileNamePool array, that contain all the files in the /resources/cards/ folder that are needed to create the deck and finally, it calls the initializeDeck(cc) method to create the list of ObjectiveCards.
Observable - Interface in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller
This interface is used to implement the Observer pattern.
onBackClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.ChooseStartCardController
Handles the back button click.
onCloseClick() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.ShowResultsController
Method that closes the application for the player
onConfirmClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.ChoosePrivateObjectiveController
Handles the confirm button click.
onConfirmClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.ChooseStartCardController
Handles the confirm button click.
onConfirmClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.ChooseTokenController
This method is called when the player presses the confirmButton It sends the token to the server
onContinueClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.LobbyController
Handles the continue button click event
onFirstButtonClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.ChoosePrivateObjectiveController
Handles the first objective button click.
onFlipCard1Click(ActionEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.KingdomController
Action of the flipCard1 button, flips the first card of the hand
onFlipCard2Click(ActionEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.KingdomController
Action of the flipCard2 button, flips the second card of the hand
onFlipCard3Click(ActionEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.KingdomController
Action of the flipCard3 button, flips the third card of the hand
onFrontClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.ChooseStartCardController
Handles the front button click.
onLoad() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.ChoosePrivateObjectiveController
Initializes the scene.
onLoad() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.ChooseStartCardController
Initializes the scene.
onLoad() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.KingdomController
Initializes the controller
onLoad() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.LobbyController
This method is called when the scene is loaded It sets the player name, the lobby number and the number of players needed to start the game It also sets the names of the players
onPlayAgainClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.ShowResultsController
Method that allows the player to return to the home page
onResultsClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.KingdomController
Action of the results button, changes the scene to the results
onReturnToLobby(ActionEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.ChooseStartCardController
Handles the return to lobby button click.
onReturnToLobbyClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.ChoosePrivateObjectiveController
Handles the return to lobby button click.
onReturnToLobbyClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.ChooseTokenController
This method is called when the player presses the returnToLobby button It returns the player to the login screen
onReturnToLobbyClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.KingdomController
Action of the return to lobby button, changes the scene to the login
onReturnToLobbyClicked(ActionEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.LobbyController
Handles the return to lobby button click event
onSecondButtonClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.ChoosePrivateObjectiveController
Handles the second objective button click.
onSelectCard1Click(ActionEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.KingdomController
Action of the handCard1 button, changes the selected card to the one in the first position of the hand
onSelectCard2Click(ActionEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.KingdomController
Action of the handCard2 button, changes the selected card to the one in the second position of the hand
onSelectCard3Click(ActionEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.KingdomController
Action of the handCard3 button, changes the selected card to the one in the third position of the hand
opposite() - Method in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.objective.Direction
The opposite() method returns the opposite (both horizontally and vertically) Position relatively to the one that calls the method.
otherResource - Variable in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.objective.PlacementBoundObjective
The otherResource attribute contains the colour of the other two cards that are required to complete the objective.
OVER - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.game.GameStatus
the over Status is the phase of the game where the game is over and proceed to calculate the points.
